transition_log.note: decisions.md: A=consume resolveComposition precedence (all-included), B=header builder per header_format (yaml_frontmatter/json_object/none), C=one-handle prefix join (inherited), D=context_hash over (context,componentVersions); architecture guard exit 0; SHA b2b24f6
built via generator + guard exit 0 + SHA 38f2e25

Added packages/ai/agent-compiler/src/resolve/composition.ts exporting resolveBody(db, agentSlug, context) → {body, componentVersions}. Ordering + context filtering is a SINGLE delegated call to CompositionStore.resolveComposition — not re-implemented. Exported from src/index.ts. Test seeds 3 real registry rows (one context-conditioned at position=3) into a real on-disk SQLite DB via agent-registry store APIs; asserts body is sections joined in position order, conditional component included/excluded per context, and empty-agent edge case. Guard (nx test agent-compiler --testFile=composition-resolve.test.ts) exited 0, 3/3 tests passing, deterministic on two consecutive runs. Commit a90b2b7.

Added resolveTools(db, agentSlug, platform) in resolve/tools.ts: fetches agent_tools grants via AgentToolStore.listForAgent, then BindingStore.listForPlatform (one platform-keyed query, idx_bindings_platform), builds a Map<toolName, binding>, walks grants in order and drops availability=unavailable. Exported from index.ts. Test tool-header.test.ts seeds real rows via seed() + AgentToolStore.grant(), proves claude_code returns PascalCase aliases (Read/Grep/WebSearch), claude_api returns snake_case aliases (read_file/web_search), human_input dropped on claude_api (unavailable), persistence via close+reopen, empty-agent edge case. Guard exit 0, 7/7 tests pass, deterministic on re-run. Commit ee04f42.

Added resolve/model.ts (resolveModel delegates to ModelStore.resolveModelId with platform-keyed binding; falls back to canonical id on MODEL_BINDING_NOT_FOUND, Decision E recorded) and resolve/policy.ts (resolvePolicyConstraints delegates to AgentPolicyStore.resolveForAgent for 3-query direct+inherited merge, joins PolicyTemplateStore.read per slug, produces Constraint[]). Both exported from src/index.ts. Test model-policy.test.ts seeds real rows on on-disk DB via seedProvider+seedPolicy+AgentStore+TaxonomyStore+AgentPolicyStore; asserts resolveModel claude_code=opus, claude_api=claude-opus-4-8, no-credentials constraint present, inherited reviewer-posture constraint present (inheritedFrom=category), empty constraints for no-policy agent (dod.3 negative-control), persistence via close+reopen. Fix: multi-package migrations require provider first (1750* timestamps) before registry+policy (1782* timestamps) — Drizzle skips entries with when<=last-recorded. Guard: 10/10 tests pass exit 0, deterministic on second run. Commit: 213f40b

APPROVED: single-DB topology confirmed (client.ts:31-40), no cross-pkg FKs (schema.ts skeleton), body-ordering fully delegated to resolveComposition (composition.ts:62), all binding reads go through store classes (tools.ts:78, model.ts:65, policy.ts:65), platform:node + @adhd/ imports + JSDoc + real-rows tests all pass. One advisory: body join uses 
 not 

 — emit-phase must confirm separator ownership.

Added emit/markdown.ts (yaml_frontmatter), emit/json.ts (json_object, separate file for dod.7), compile.ts (compileAgent orchestrator), updated index.ts. The 

 separator advisory was resolved at the emit layer: composition.ts:72 joins with 
 and is read-only, so compile.ts calls CompositionStore.resolveComposition directly to own the join and applies 

 between sections per Decision B.1 — no composition.ts edit required, no blocker raised. Guard: npx nx test agent-compiler --testFile=...compile-agent.test.ts → 21/21 tests, exit 0, confirmed deterministic on second run. Commit: d45490ea6f8c14cb0ed85e75695c5d38d7d08ade.

Added src/cli/compile.ts (argv parser + dispatcher), bin entry in package.json, and compile-cli.test.ts spawning real child process. Guard: npx nx test agent-compiler --testFile=compile-cli.test.ts → exit 0, 8/8 passed. Bin invoked as node dist/.../src/cli/compile.js; @adhd symlinks created in dist/node_modules/@adhd by beforeAll so ESM resolution works. Fixed pre-existing TS2352 in compile.ts (double-cast via unknown) to unblock tsc build. Commit: 75125d2.

Added cache/composed-prompt-cache.ts (lookup+write, Decision D combined hash: registryContextHash(ctx)+" "+sortedJSON(versions)+" "+platform), wired into compileAgent as cache-first SELECT before assembly (dod.4 negative-control), CompiledAgent.id null→number, compile-agent.test.ts placeholder updated, compile-cache.test.ts proves persistence by CLOSE+REOPEN + resolveComposition spy confirms assembly bypassed on HIT + different context yields new row (count 1→2); guard exit 0 (57/57); commit 4becf50
